violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residue/debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is not currently functioning and is not in use. Ice machine must be properly cleaned and sanitized prior to next use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Staff does not sanitize barware after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Plastic is to be used until proper sanitizer and test strips are purchased to be used for barware. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution (chlorine) for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
